title: Myrcianthes dugandii

intro: Myrcianthes dugandii, also known as the Guabén fruit tree, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family (Myrtaceae). The Guabén fruit tree has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of the Guabén fruit tree include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made from the Guabén fruit tree include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions in folk medicine.
